update.releaseNotes:
v5.5.1 - Changelog
Adjustments --- - Improve training-selection logs so it is clear when the bot picked a training based on its normal analysis versus when it fell back to a default choice (e.g. forcing a rainbow training when no charm trainings were eligible). - Log Trackblazer training-selection outcomes to distinguish analysis-driven picks from forced fallbacks.
Fixes --- - Fix bug in Trackblazer where the bot would only use one energy item per turn even when more were needed. It now correctly stacks multiple energy items in a single inventory pass to bring the trainee back up to a healthy energy level.
